name: Pear and Onion Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the peanut oil in a large skillet over high heat.
2. Add the chopped onions and sauté for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until they begin to brown lightly.
3. Reduce the heat to medium.
4. Continue cooking the onions, stirring frequently, for another 20-30 minutes until caramelized.
5. Stir in the diced pear, brown sugar, cayenne pepper, kosher salt, and cider vinegar.
6. Cook the mixture until the pears are tender-crisp.
7. Remove from heat and drain any excess liquid.
8. Transfer the onion mixture to a sterile jar.
9. In the same skillet, heat the reserved juices over medium heat.
10. Stir until the juices reduce to form a syrupy glaze.
11. Pour the glaze over the onion mixture and stir well.
12. Cover and chill indefinitely. Serve slightly chilled or at room temperature.
